description: A content marketer wants to turn a data-heavy blog post into a more visually engaging infographic.

nodes.task_description: Extract the key data points and statistics from the blog post.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the most important pieces of data to visualize.

nodes.task_description: Outline a narrative flow for the infographic.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a logical story for the data to follow.

nodes.task_description: Use a design tool to create the infographic, using charts, icons, and branded visuals.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a professional and easy-to-understand infographic.
